name: add_activity_message
summary: Append a non-destructive comment/message to one activity when write tools are enabled.

name: delete_activity
summary: Delete one activity by activity_id.

name: get_activities
summary: Scan an athlete-local date window and return a paginated activity index: terse unit-disambiguated summary rows with IDs, source/device hints, tags, explicitly requested custom_fields, and Strava-unavailable markers.

name: get_activities_around
summary: Find activities recorded near or around a known reference activity_id without asking the model to invent a date window.

name: get_activity_details
summary: Get one activity's terse metadata and metrics by activity_id, including upstream activity tags when returned, calories_burned as active/exercise calories (distinct from wellness kcal_consumed), carbs_ingested_g for athlete-logged carb intake, carbs_used_g for upstream carbs-burned estimate, and explicitly requested athlete-defined custom_fields when upstream provides them.

name: get_activity_histogram
summary: Use when the prompt asks for a single activity's power, heart-rate, or pace distribution; do not fetch get_activity_streams samples and bin them in chat.

name: get_activity_intervals
summary: Get analyzed intervals for one activity by activity_id, including scalar custom interval fields such as lactate under custom_fields when upstream includes them.

name: get_activity_messages
summary: List comments and notes on one activity by activity_id.

name: get_activity_splits
summary: Get manual or virtual per-km/per-mile activity splits by activity_id.

name: get_activity_streams
summary: Get canonical activity stream channels by activity_id.

name: get_extended_metrics
summary: Get one activity's upstream-exposed extended metrics by activity_id.

name: set_activity_intervals
summary: Set or correct the interval structure on one completed activity by writing a structured workout_doc as the activity's description; intervals.icu re-parses the DSL into rendered intervals overlaid on the recording.

name: update_activity
summary: Rename and/or replace the free-text description of one completed activity by activity_id.

name: analyze_correlation
summary: Use when the prompt asks whether two analysis metrics are correlated or lagged together, including explicitly requested activity custom fields via metric custom:<field_code> plus custom_fields; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

name: analyze_distribution
summary: Use when the prompt asks for an analysis metric's distribution, histogram, quantiles, or outliers; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

name: analyze_efforts_delta
summary: Use when the prompt asks about named best-effort curve buckets (for example 5 min power, 20 min HR, or 5k pace) and current-vs-baseline deltas; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

name: analyze_trend
summary: Use when the prompt asks for slope or rolling trend direction over time for one analysis metric; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

name: compute_activity_segment_stats
summary: Use when the prompt asks for mean, median, p90, normalized power, intensity factor, drift, or decoupling over an explicit activity segment, including first-vs-last distance comparisons, as the analyzer-family raw-stream exception, or when get_activity_intervals reports a single averaged/collapsed lap caveat and the user needs stream-based evidence before judging interval execution; do not fetch get_activity_streams samples and reduce them in chat.

name: compute_baseline
summary: Use when the prompt asks whether current metric values are unusual relative to a historical baseline via z-score/status bands; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

name: compute_compliance_rate
summary: Use when the prompt asks how well completed activities matched scheduled workouts, targets, sport, or event type; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

name: compute_load_balance
summary: Use when the prompt asks whether training distribution is polarized, pyramidal, threshold-heavy, or balanced across low/moderate/high intensity; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

name: compute_zone_time
summary: Use when the prompt asks for zone-time totals or intensity distribution (seconds/share in Z1-Zn) across activities in a date window; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

name: get_data_quality_report
summary: Report whether icuvisor can see enough activities, streams, load, wellness, thresholds, and calendar data to answer common coaching questions, with actionable diagnostics for Strava restrictions, HR/TRIMP-only load, stale wellness, missing thresholds, and sparse history.

name: list_athletes
summary: List the coach-mode roster configured for this icuvisor server.

name: select_athlete
summary: Select the default target athlete for subsequent coach-mode tool calls in this MCP session.

name: create_custom_item
summary: Create one custom item definition.

name: delete_custom_item
summary: Delete one custom item definition by item_id.

name: get_custom_item_by_id
summary: Fetch one custom item by item_id and preserve its full content payload.

name: get_custom_items
summary: List custom item definitions such as charts, fields, streams, panels, histograms, maps, and zones.

name: update_custom_item
summary: Update one custom item definition by item_id with sparse fields only.

name: add_or_update_event
summary: Create or update a non-destructive calendar event such as a planned workout, race, or note.

name: add_unavailable_date_range
summary: Create unavailable calendar markers across an inclusive athlete-local date range for Sick, Injured, or Holiday/time-off blocks.

name: delete_event
summary: Delete one calendar event by event_id.

name: delete_events_by_date_range
summary: Delete calendar events in a required athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD start_date/end_date range, optionally filtered by category.

name: get_event_by_id
summary: Fetch a single calendar event detail by event_id.

name: get_events
summary: List calendar events across a bounded athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date range.

name: link_activity_to_event
summary: Manually pair one completed activity with one planned calendar event when intervals.icu auto-pairing misses (forum #97).

name: resolve_calendar_dates
summary: Resolve athlete-local calendar anchors before planning, scheduling, or answering date-sensitive prompts such as today, tomorrow, next week, or N days from today.

name: get_best_efforts
summary: Get upstream best efforts grouped by sport and default/requested power, heart-rate, and pace buckets.

name: get_fitness
summary: Get CTL, ATL, and TSB fitness trends for a local date range.

name: get_fitness_projection
summary: Use when the prompt asks to project CTL, ATL, or TSB forward; do not fetch get_fitness rows and model the curve in chat.

name: get_hr_curves
summary: Get upstream-computed heart-rate best-effort curves for a date range.

name: get_pace_curves
summary: Get upstream-computed pace best-effort curves for a date range.

name: get_performance_potential
summary: Summarize per-sport performance potential from explicit athlete profile thresholds plus upstream power, pace, and heart-rate curve anchors.

name: get_power_curves
summary: Get the upstream-computed mean-maximal power curve for a date range.

name: get_today
summary: Answer how's today looking with one terse daily digest: today's CTL/ATL/TSB fitness, wellness, completed activities, planned events, and NOTE/race annotations.

name: get_training_summary
summary: Get aggregated training volume, neutral training load, sRPE, and upstream zone-order totals for a local date range.

name: icuvisor_check_server_version
summary: Check whether the MCP client is using stale icuvisor tool descriptions after an upgrade.

name: icuvisor_list_advanced_capabilities
summary: Use only when the user asks what other icuvisor tools are available or when a requested advanced/delete capability is not visible in the current tool catalog.

name: delete_gear
summary: Delete one gear item by gear_id.

name: delete_sport_settings
summary: Delete one sport-settings definition by sport_settings_id.

name: get_athlete_profile
summary: Get the configured athlete profile, FTP/thresholds, zones, and sport settings from intervals.icu.

name: get_gear_list
summary: List the athlete's intervals.icu gear with IDs and human-readable names for resolving activity gear_id fields.

name: update_sport_settings
summary: Update one sport's FTP, threshold heart rate, threshold pace, or zone definitions referenced by get_athlete_profile _meta.warnings.

name: get_wellness_data
summary: Get daily wellness rows for a local date range with distinct sleepQuality, sleepScore, sleepSecs, nutrition keys calories_intake/carbs_g/protein_g/fat_g when present, custom fields, native provider sidecars, and provider-native provenance scale labels for sleep/readiness.

name: update_wellness
summary: Update one athlete-local wellness row with sparse manual fields: subjective scales, measurements, injury text, and locked; legacy feel remains in the input schema for compatibility but rejects with field_not_writable: feel (not accepted by intervals.icu wellness write), device-owned sleepScore rejects with field_not_writable: sleepScore (device-managed), and _native rejects with field_not_writable: _native (bridge-managed).

name: apply_annual_training_plan
summary: Safely preview and apply phase notes from propose_annual_training_plan.

name: apply_training_plan
summary: Apply a workout-library training plan to the athlete calendar from an anchor start date.

name: create_workout
summary: Create a reusable workout-library template, not a calendar event.

name: delete_workout
summary: Delete one reusable workout-library template by workout_id.

name: get_annual_training_plan
summary: Use when the prompt asks about annual training plan, season phase, weekly load/TSS targets, recovery weeks, taper context, or periodization summary; do not manually join raw get_events rows in chat.

name: get_planning_context
summary: Fetch read-only weekly planning context without creating an ATP or calendar writes: athlete-local week events/workouts, active training-plan assignment summary, current fitness context, upcoming races, and caveats.

name: get_training_plan
summary: Fetch the athlete's active training-plan assignment, not calendar events or workout-library templates.

name: get_workout_library
summary: List workout-library folders and plans, not calendar events or the active training-plan assignment.

name: get_workouts_in_folder
summary: List workout-library templates inside one folder or plan by folder_id.

name: propose_annual_training_plan
summary: Use when the prompt asks to propose a season plan, annual training plan, race build, taper, recovery weeks, weekly load targets, or projection-ready ATP bridge; do not roll ATP/projection math in chat and do not write calendar data.

name: update_workout
summary: Update one reusable workout-library template by workout_id with sparse fields only.

name: validate_workout
summary: Validate an intervals.icu workout description, a structured workout_doc, or both, and return the canonical merged DSL plus estimated duration that icuvisor would submit on a write.
